name: Windows Defender Firewall Has Been Reset To Its Default Configuration
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Windows Defender Firewall Has Been Reset To Its Default Configuration
SIGMA Description: Detects activity when Windows Defender Firewall has been reset to its default configuration

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('2032', '2060') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Windows Defender Firewall Has Been Reset To Its Default Configuration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('2032', '2060') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Windows Defender Firewall Has Been Reset To Its Default Configuration

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
